phrases.text_local: Onde posso encontrar o Miradouro das Portas do Sol?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih PAW-soo ayng-koongt-RAHR AW mee-ruh-DOHW-roo DUHSH POH-ruh-tuhsh DOO SAWL?

likely_response.local: Siga as placas para o Miradouro das Portas do Sol.
likely_response.pronunciation: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AW mee-ruh-DOHW-roo DUHSH POH-ruh-tuhsh DOO SAWL.
likely_response.translation_en: Follow the signs to the Portas do Sol viewpoint.

responses.english: Follow the signs to the Portas do Sol viewpoint.
responses.phonetic: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AW mee-ruh-DOHW-roo DUHSH POH-ruh-tuhsh DOO SAWL.
responses.local: Siga as placas para o Miradouro das Portas do Sol.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the flea market stalls are
phrases.text_local: Onde estão as bancas da Feira da Ladra agora?
phrases.cultural_note: Vendors spread across Campo de Santa Clara with antiques and crafts.

likely_response.local: Bom dia, siga a multidão pela rua principal.
likely_response.pronunciation: BOHNG DEEUH, SEE-guh AH moow-tee-DOWN PEH-luh ROOUH preen-see-PAHL.
likely_response.translation_en: Good day, follow the crowd down the main street.

responses.english: Good day, follow the crowd down the main street.
responses.phonetic: BOHNG DEEUH, SEE-guh AH moow-tee-DOWN PEH-luh ROOUH preen-see-PAHL.
responses.local: Bom dia, siga a multidão pela rua principal.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the Fado museum is
phrases.text_local: Sabe onde fica o Museu do Fado?
phrases.pronunciation: SAH-bih OHNG-dih FEE-kuh AW moo-ZEHOO DOO FAH-doo?
phrases.cultural_note: The museum preserves Lisbon's traditional music heritage and instruments.

likely_response.local: Siga as placas para o Museu do Fado.
likely_response.pronunciation: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AW moo-ZEHOO DOO FAH-doo.
likely_response.translation_en: Follow the signs to the Fado Museum.

responses.english: Follow the signs to the Fado Museum.
responses.phonetic: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AW moo-ZEHOO DOO FAH-doo.
responses.local: Siga as placas para o Museu do Fado.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the Sé Cathedral entrance is
phrases.text_local: Onde fica a entrada da Sé de Lisboa?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih FEE-kuh AH ayngt-RAH-duh DUH SEH DIH leezh-BOHUH?
phrases.cultural_note: The cathedral is Lisbon's oldest church, dating back to 1147.

likely_response.local: Siga as placas para a Sé de Lisboa.
likely_response.pronunciation: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AH SEH DIH leezh-BOHUH.
likely_response.translation_en: Follow the signs to the Lisbon Cathedral.

responses.english: Follow the signs to the Lisbon Cathedral.
responses.phonetic: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AH SEH DIH leezh-BOHUH.
responses.local: Siga as placas para a Sé de Lisboa.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the Santa Luzia viewpoint is
phrases.text_local: Onde fica o Miradouro de Santa Luzia?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih FEE-kuh AW mee-ruh-DOHW-roo DIH SAHNNG-tuh loo-ZEEUH?
phrases.cultural_note: Miradouro de Santa Luzia offers panoramic views over the Tagus River and the historic Alfama district, and it's one of Lisbon's most beloved viewpoints.

likely_response.local: Siga as placas para o Miradouro de Santa Luzia.
likely_response.pronunciation: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AW mee-ruh-DOHW-roo DIH SAHNNG-tuh loo-ZEEUH.
likely_response.translation_en: Follow the signs to the Santa Luzia viewpoint.

responses.english: Follow the signs to the Santa Luzia viewpoint.
responses.phonetic: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AW mee-ruh-DOHW-roo DIH SAHNNG-tuh loo-ZEEUH.
responses.local: Siga as placas para o Miradouro de Santa Luzia.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the Fado Museum is
phrases.text_local: Onde fica o Museu do Fado?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih FEE-kuh AW moo-ZEHOO DOO FAH-doo?
phrases.cultural_note: Alfama's steep streets require precise directional cues for navigation.

likely_response.local: Siga as placas para o Museu do Fado ou pergunte a um guia local.
likely_response.pronunciation: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AW moo-ZEHOO DOO FAH-doo OHW peh-ruh-GOONNG-tih AH OONNG GEEUH loo-KAHL.
likely_response.translation_en: Follow the signs to the Fado Museum or ask a local guide.

responses.english: Follow the signs to the Fado Museum or ask a local guide.
responses.phonetic: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AW moo-ZEHOO DOO FAH-doo OHW peh-ruh-GOONNG-tih AH OONNG GEEUH loo-KAHL.
responses.local: Siga as placas para o Museu do Fado ou pergunte a um guia local.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the flea market is
phrases.text_local: Pode indicar onde está a Feira da Ladra hoje?
phrases.pronunciation: PAW-dih een-dee-KAHR OHNG-dih ehs-TAH AH FAY-ruh DUH LAHD-ruh OH-zhih?
phrases.cultural_note: The market operates Tuesdays and Saturdays near the castle grounds.

likely_response.local: A Feira da Ladra é no Campo de Santa Clara, perto da igreja.
likely_response.pronunciation: AH FAY-ruh DUH LAHD-ruh EH NOO KAHNM-poo DIH SAHNNG-tuh KLAH-ruh, PEHR-too DUH eeg-REH-zhuh.
likely_response.translation_en: The Flea Market is at Campo de Santa Clara, near the church.

responses.english: The Flea Market is at Campo de Santa Clara, near the church.
responses.phonetic: AH FAY-ruh DUH LAHD-ruh EH NOO KAHNM-poo DIH SAHNNG-tuh KLAH-ruh, PEHR-too DUH eeg-REH-zhuh.
responses.local: A Feira da Ladra é no Campo de Santa Clara, perto da igreja.
